SWE-Squad

Autonomous AI agents for production incident management

Welcome to SWE-Squad — an AI-powered platform that detects, triages, investigates, and resolves production incidents automatically.

Documentation

Architecture Overview

SWE-Squad automates the full incident lifecycle through a five-stage pipeline.

flowchart LR
    Monitor --> Triage --> Investigate --> Fix --> StabilityGate
Monitor Detects incidents from alerts and error signals
Triage Classifies severity and assigns the right model
Investigate Deep root-cause analysis with code context
Fix Generates and applies targeted patches
Stability Gate Validates fix correctness before merge

Model Routing

Different tasks use different models — optimized for cost and quality.

Tier Model Cost Use Case
Fast Haiku ~$0.25/1M tokens Triage, initial classification
Balanced Sonnet ~$3.00/1M tokens Investigation, patch generation
Expert Opus ~$15.00/1M tokens Complex fixes, architecture decisions
Cached Fixes Are Free
Previously resolved patterns are cached and reused at zero model cost — no invocation needed.

Get Started

bash 
git clone https://github.com/swe-squad/swe-squad.git
cd swe-squad
cp .env.example .env
docker compose up -d
